title: npm Hook Event Payload
description: The webhook event payload delivered by npm hooks when registry changes occur. Each payload is signed with HMAC SHA-256 using the shared secret configured on the hook subscription.

event.description: The type of registry event that occurred.

name.description: The name of the package associated with the event.

type.description: The type of entity that triggered the hook subscription.

version.description: The version of the package associated with the event, if applicable.

hookOwner.description: The npm user who owns the hook subscription.

username.description: The npm username of the hook owner.

payload.description: Event-specific payload data containing details about what changed.

change.description: Details about the specific change that occurred.

maintainer.description: The affected maintainer username, if applicable.

time.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.
